memoryArtifacts.headline: Cowthally Castle, Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland
memoryArtifacts.description:
Cowthally Castle, view of a ruined overgrown castle with remnants of a round tower to the left, on a hill-top with a stream running into the foreground to right, a spire among trees in the distance to right and mountains in the background; illustration to Scott's edition of Somerville's 'Memorie of the Somervilles ...'. 1815
Print made by: Richard Rhodes

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville於1370年1月出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾卡瓦斯時，他的父親Sir Wiliam De Somerville30歲，母親Katherine Halliday - Heiress of Moffat20歲。他於1391年1月與Janet Stewart在蘇格蘭藍納可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1444年12月在蘇格蘭藍納可爾卡瓦斯享年74歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭藍納可爾卡瓦斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville于1370年1月出生在苏格兰藍納可爾卡瓦斯时，他的父亲Sir Wiliam De Somerville30岁，母亲Katherine Halliday - Heiress of Moffat20岁。他于1391年1月与Janet Stewart在苏格兰藍納可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1444年12月在苏格兰藍納可爾卡瓦斯享年74岁，埋葬在苏格兰藍納可爾卡瓦斯。

nameMeanings.name: Somerville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Graveron-Sémerville in Eure (Normandy), from the ancient Germanic personal name Sigimar (see Siemer ) + Old French ville ‘settlement’. The surname was taken to Scotland in the 12th century by William de Somerville, a retainer of David, Earl of Huntingdon, who became King David I of Scotland.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Somacháin (see Summers ) or Mag Shamradháin (see Somers ).

variants.name: Siemer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Helmuth, Otto, Theresia.
German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Siegmar, composed of the elements sigi ‘victory’ + mari, meri ‘famous’.

variants.name: Summerville
meanings: English, Scottish (Lanarkshire), and Irish: variant of   Somerville  . This form of the surname is particularly common in Ireland.

variants.name: Simrell
meanings: Scottish: perhaps related to the Ulster nameSumeril, a variant of Somerville .

variants.name: Summerfield
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called with Old English sumor ‘summer’ + feld ‘field, open land’, denoting summer pasture or fields cultivated only in summer, such as Summerfield in Woodnesborough (Kent), Somerfield Court in Sellindge (Kent), and Summerfield in Marlborough (Wiltshire).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Sommerfeld  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville was born in January 1370, in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Wiliam De Somerville, was 30 and his mother, Katherine Halliday - Heiress of Moffat, was 20. He married Janet Stewart in January 1391, in Lanarkshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died in December 1444, in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland, at the age of 74, and was buried in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville est né en janvier 1370, à Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Wiliam De Somerville, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Katherine Halliday - Heiress of Moffat, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Janet Stewart en janvier 1391, à Lanarkshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en décembre 1444, à Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville im Januar 1370 in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Wiliam De Somerville 30 und seine Mutter Katherine Halliday - Heiress of Moffat 20. Er hat im Januar 1391 in Lanarkshire, Scotland Janet Stewart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb im Dezember 1444 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland und wurde in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville è nato il nel gennaio 1370 nel Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Wiliam De Somerville, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Halliday - Heiress of Moffat, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Janet Stewart nel gennaio 1391, nel Lanarkshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel dicembre 1444, nel Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somervilleが1370年1月にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアカーンワスで生まれた時，父Sir Wiliam De Somervilleは30歳，母Katherine Halliday - Heiress of Moffatは20歳であった。1391年1月にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアでJanet Stewartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1444年12月にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアカーンワスで74歳で死去し，スコットランドラナルクシュアイアカーンワスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville(이)가 1370년 1월 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 카른왓h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Wiliam De Somerville(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Halliday - Heiress of Moffat(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1391년 1월 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르에서 Janet Stewart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1444년 12월 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 카른왓h에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 카른왓h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville nasceu em janeiro de 1370, em Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Wiliam De Somerville, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Halliday - Heiress of Moffat, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Janet Stewart em janeiro de 1391, em Lanarkshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em dezembro de 1444, em Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville родился январь 1370 г. в местности карнват, ланаркшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Wiliam De Somerville было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Halliday - Heiress of Moffat, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Janet Stewart январь 1391 г. в местности ланаркшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер декабрь 1444 г. в местности карнват, ланаркшир, Шотландия в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности карнват, ланаркшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville nació en enero de 1370, en Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Wiliam De Somerville, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Katherine Halliday - Heiress of Moffat, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Janet Stewart en enero de 1391, en Lanarkshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en diciembre de 1444, en Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland.
